news.title:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc and Cairn Oil & Gas plan ₹1 lakh crore investment in Rajasthan.
Vedanta units contributed nearly ₹3 lakh crore to exchequers in the past decade.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd surged 3.4% on 20 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 523.75 intraday.
The stock outperformed the Non Ferrous Metals sector and Sensex after 2-day decline.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd surged 3.4% on 20 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 523.75 intraday.

news.title:
Metal stocks like NALCO, Hindustan Zinc, and Tata Steel nosedived due to weak global cues and gas supply concerns.
Sensex dropped over 900 points, Nifty fell 300 points, marking a third consecutive session of losses.
news.summary:

news.title:

The collaboration aims to boost production and promote sustainability in zinc alloy sector.

news.title:
Govt exempts recycling of tailings in mines from fresh EC, easing regulations.
Hindustan Zinc may benefit as mining firms can reuse tailings without new EC.

news.title:

The hub ensures raw material supply and long-term purchase agreements.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd announced an analyst/investor meet under SEBI Regulation 30.
The meet, part of Kotak Securities' conference, is scheduled for Feb 25, 2026, in Mumbai.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.

The initiative is in collaboration with JNCASR, advancing India's energy storage research.

news.title:

International silver prices increased about 10%, further supporting Hind Zinc.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd's directors approved raising up to Rs 1,400 crore via debentures.
The funds support capacity expansion for zinc, EVs, renewables, and rare earth exploration.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc approved allotment of 42,000 NCDs worth ₹420 Cr and 98,000 NCDs worth ₹980 Cr.
Total cumulative principal is capped at ₹1,400 Cr, with resolution passed on Feb 2, 2026.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc approved allotment of 42,000 NCDs worth ₹420 Cr and 98,000 NCDs worth ₹980 Cr.
Total cumulative principal is capped at ₹1,400 Cr, with resolution passed on Feb 2, 2026.

news.title:
GMDC shares rose 3% and NMDC recovered 0.4% after FM announced rare-earth corridors in Budget 2026.
Nalco and Hindustan Zinc shares fell 7.9% and 8.6% respectively, amid a broader metals sell-off.
news.summary:
GMDC shares rose 3% and NMDC recovered 0.4% after FM announced rare-earth corridors in Budget 2026.
Nalco and Hindustan Zinc shares fell 7.9% and 8.6% respectively, amid a broader metals sell-off.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd. witnessed a block trade of ~368,582 shares at Rs. 567.25.
The transaction value totaled Rs. 20.9 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd. witnessed a block trade of ~368,582 shares at Rs. 567.25.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc shares dropped 12.5% on Friday, erasing ₹36,000 crore in market cap after a record global silver price fall.
Vedanta's recent 1.6% OFS worth ₹4,500 crore saw Hindustan Zinc's stock dip below its indicative price and floor price.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc shares dropped 12.5% on Friday, erasing ₹36,000 crore in market cap after a record global silver price fall.
Vedanta's recent 1.6% OFS worth ₹4,500 crore saw Hindustan Zinc's stock dip below its indicative price and floor price.
